title: To The Ladies.
content:
Trust me, ladies, I will do
    Nothing to distemper you;
    If I any fret or vex,
    Men they shall be, not your sex.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To The Ladies."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
